title: croton chlorocalyx
intro: Croton chlorocalyx, also known as the 'Yellow Leaf Croton', is a tropical evergreen plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croton chlorocalyx include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, Croton chlorocalyx can be used as a decoction or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
